understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the goal gem tile '+' by navigating the grid, falling in the gravity direction after each horizontal move, while avoiding spikes and using clicks to remove breakable blocks.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT). After a move, the player falls in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile. Gravity DOWN means falling toward lower y (upward on screen). CLICK removes breakable 'x' tiles at a specified position, spending a turn. Spikes ('u'/'v') end the attempt on contact. UNDO reverses the last action. The corridor scan previews landing positions for every column. The player has limited turns per attempt and multiple attempts per level.
